global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with promotional text and a product display area.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time offer for ZenDrop.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center with a light pink outline, suggesting a placeholder for a product image.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text in the center reads 'Your next favorite pick Only this weekend', conveying urgency and excitement.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Only this weekend

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' is displayed in a large, bold font at the top left, colored in black for contrast against the red background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow circular badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, indicating a special offer.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small white tag in the top left corner labeled 'UGC', suggesting authenticity and user engagement.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and vibrant, ZenDrop, SALE, Try for free
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your next favorite pick, Only this weekend, ZenDrop, Try for free, SALE, UGC
